extraction_notes: Compiled dual-segment structure with four primary software platforms (Gotham, Foundry, AIP, Apollo) and two derivative offerings (Developer Tier, Industry Operating Systems). Preserved parent-child hierarchy where Developer Tier descends from both Foundry and AIP, and Industry Operating Systems descends from Foundry. Omitted 'Cloud partnerships' channel due to absence from canonical label set. Captured cross-segment presence of AIP and Apollo. Revenue models not assigned to Developer Tier as memo explicitly states none described.
